verifications.name: Powerpuff Tag Team Match Possible
verifications.constraint: And(Distinct(p1,p2,p3,p4), Or(p1 == blossom, p1 == bubbles, p1 == buttercup), Or(p2 == blossom, p2 == bubbles, p2 == buttercup), Or(p3 == blossom, p3 == bubbles, p3 == buttercup), Or(p4 == blossom, p4 == bubbles, p4 == buttercup))
